name: Marinated Salmon Danish Style
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup chopped cooked and roughly chopped asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Asparagus Mayonnaise: In a food processor, blend the egg yolks, asparagus, and lemon juice. Continue blending and gradually add the olive oil while the blender is running. Mix in the salt and pepper to taste. The mixture should be about 2 cups.
2. Salmon: Place the salmon skin side down in a flat container or dish. Sprinkle the salt (saltpeter), sugar, salt, black pepper, and chopped basil evenly over the fish. Pour beer over the fish until it is completely covered. Cover the dish with plastic wrap or foil and refrigerate for 2 weeks.
3. To serve: Remove the salmon from the refrigerator and drain any excess liquid. Using a sharp knife, slice the salmon very thinly. Place the slices on a bed of lettuce leaves. Spoon some asparagus mayonnaise over the fish and garnish with tomato slices and lemon wedges if desired. This recipe serves 8 people.
